priorChapterMeaning.situation: The Warden ended Chapter 1 in the settlement hall with the filing delayed but not defeated.
priorChapterMeaning.tension: Delay became a public act that neither settlement nor Synod can unsee.
priorChapterMeaning.ticking: The next institutional response is already moving beyond the room.
priorChapterMeaning.question: What does the delay mean once the world outside the hall answers it?
priorChapterMeaning.closer: The door closed on the hall, but not on the record.

turns.narratorProse: The Warden stood in the settlement hall as the filing clock paused.

arcPlan.title: The Open Window

sourceHook.title: The Tithe
sourceHook.premise: A frontier settlement is short three Resonants.
sourceHook.crucible: The Synod will take children if the numbers are not met.

scenarioShape.premise: The shortfall turns into visible civic fracture.
scenarioShape.whyThisRun: The pressure belongs to the settlement's public order.
scenarioShape.whatThisIsNot: This is not the same hall scene continued.

arcPlan.arcQuestion: Can Imperial authority prevent civic fracture without becoming the fracture's instrument?
arcPlan.coreCrucible: Every delay teaches the settlement that resistance has shape.
variableTruthsForThisRun: The settlement is closer to revolt than its leaders admit.

pressureEngines.name: Public unrest
pressureEngines.advancesWhen: children are named or rumors spread
pressureEngines.visibleSymptoms: work crews gather and stop obeying routines

chapterFunctionMap.function: the world outside the room answers
